project.description: Project the environment belongs to (defaults to "default").

The environment definition as YAML text. ESC documents carry

it encrypted.

pulumiservice:orgs/agents:AgentPool.description: A pool of self-hosted deployment agents for running Pulumi Deployments.

enforceSAML.description: When true, require SAML for all org members (no local-credential fallback).

metadataUrl.description: SAML metadata URL (IdP publishes this). Mutually exclusive with `metadataXml`.

metadataXml.description: SAML metadata document content (XML). Mutually exclusive with `metadataUrl`.

organizationName.description: Organization the identity provider is configured for.

providerType.description: Identity provider protocol. Only `saml` is supported today.

accountName.description: Account name. Must be unique within the organization.

providerConfig.description: Provider-specific configuration (region list, subscription IDs, GCP projects, etc.).

scheduledScanEnabled.description: Whether scheduled scans are currently enabled for this account.

pulumiservice:orgs/policies:PolicyGroup.description: PolicyGroup details the name, applicable entities and the applied PolicyPacks.

pulumiservice:orgs/services:Service.description:
A service is a Pulumi construct that aggregates items and additional metadata
that can be accessed by the service's members.

pulumiservice:orgs/teams:Team.description:
Team describes a Pulumi team. A Pulumi team may have its organization
managed by another service, such as GitHub.

githubTeamId.description: Numeric GitHub team ID. Required for `github` teams.

members.description: List of usernames in the team.

name.description: Team name. Must be unique within the organization. Required for `pulumi` teams.

teamType.description: Team type. "pulumi" for a Pulumi-managed team; "github" for a team synced from a GitHub organization.

teamType.description: Team type. "pulumi" for a Pulumi-managed team; "github" for a team synced from a GitHub organization.

destination.description: Optional destination settings for rendered templates.

organizationName.description: Organization the template source belongs to.

sourceName.description: Human-readable name for this template source.

sourceURL.description: URL of the template source (typically a git repository).

pulumiservice:stacks/hooks:Webhook.description:
Webhook describes a webhook registered with the Pulumi Service. It may
be registered to either an Organization, Stack or Environment.

active.description: Whether the webhook is currently firing.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the webhook.

environmentName.description: Environment the webhook belongs to (ESC-scoped webhooks only).

filters.description: Event filter strings restricting which events trigger the webhook.

format.description: Payload encoding — "raw" by default; other options shape the body for specific consumers.

name.description: Webhook name, assigned by the server.

projectName.description: Project the webhook belongs to (stack- or ESC-scoped webhooks only).

secret.description: Shared secret used to sign webhook payloads (HMAC-SHA256).

stackName.description: Stack the webhook belongs to (stack-scoped webhooks only).

active.description: Whether the webhook is currently firing.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the webhook.

environmentName.description: Environment the webhook belongs to (ESC-scoped webhooks only).

filters.description: Event filter strings restricting which events trigger the webhook.

format.description: Payload encoding — "raw" by default; other options shape the body for specific consumers.

projectName.description: Project the webhook belongs to (stack- or ESC-scoped webhooks only).

secret.description: Shared secret used to sign webhook payloads (HMAC-SHA256).

stackName.description: Stack the webhook belongs to (stack-scoped webhooks only).

pulumiservice:stacks/permissions:TeamSta.description: TeamStackPermission is the permission team membership grants to a stack.

permission.description: Permission level: 0 = no permission, 101 = read, 102 = edit, 103 = admin.
Permission level: 0 = no permission, 101 = read, 102 = edit, 103 = admin.
